name: DroidDesk
description: DroidDesk turns your Android phone into a real Linux desktop using Termux, Termux X11, TUR, and Proot. Run VS Code, Firefox, LibreOffice, Blender, and more with X11 or VNC support for monitor setup.
readme_summary: DroidDesk enables users to run a full Linux desktop environment on their Android phone, leveraging Termux, Termux X11, and Proot. It allows for the installation and execution of various Linux applications, including development tools, office suites, and even demanding software like Blender, with support for both on-device display and external monitor output via USB-C or a Raspberry Pi bridge.
key_features: Run full Linux desktop on Android
Support for XFCE4, LXQt, MATE, KDE desktop environments
Install and run applications like VS Code, LibreOffice, Blender, Wireshark, Metasploit, and local AI
X11 and VNC support for display
Optional Raspberry Pi bridge for monitor output on phones without USB-C display out
Automatic menu syncing for Proot installed applications
primary_use_case: Transforming an Android phone into a portable Linux PC capable of running a wide range of desktop applications.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant digital painting of an Android phone seamlessly transforming into a full-fledged Linux desktop computer. The phone's screen expands outwards, morphing into a monitor displaying a bustling desktop environment with icons for VS Code, LibreOffice, and Blender. From the phone's charging port, a stream of digital code flows and solidifies into a keyboard and mouse. In the background, subtle elements like a glowing Raspberry Pi and a USB-C to HDMI adapter hint at the connectivity options. The overall mood is one of powerful transformation and portable computing, with the DroidDesk logo subtly integrated into the scene.

name: vibe-draw
description: 🎨 Turn your roughest sketches into stunning 3D worlds by vibe drawing
readme_summary: Vibe Draw is a TypeScript-based application that transforms rough 2D sketches into detailed 3D models and worlds. It allows users to draw, enhance, convert to 3D, build within a 3D environment, and export their creations in glTF format.
key_features: Iterative editing of 3D models via sketching or text prompts
primary_use_case: To enable users with little to no 3D modeling experience to easily create and build 3D worlds from simple 2D sketches.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical artist, holding a magic paintbrush, stands before a blank canvas. With a single stroke, the canvas transforms from a simple, rough sketch into a vibrant, detailed 3D world that rises from the surface. Floating around the artist are glowing particles representing AI enhancement, and small, stylized UI elements showing the 'sketch-to-3D' process. The background is a soft, ethereal studio. The overall mood is one of effortless creation and imagination. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a bright, inviting color palette, emphasizing the magical transformation from 2D to 3D. The repository name 'Vibe Draw' is subtly integrated into a floating signpost.

name: mac-audit
description: Full audit of installed software on macOS
readme_summary: mac-audit is a comprehensive shell script designed to perform a full audit of installed software on macOS. It identifies applications, programming languages, AI/LLM models, Docker components, DevOps tools, security utilities, and disk usage, providing details on what is installed, where it is located, and its purpose.
key_features: Audits applications (Applications folder, Homebrew Casks, App Store, Login Items, VS Code extensions)
Scans various programming language installations (Python, Node.js, Rust, Go, Ruby, Java, PHP, etc.)
Detects AI/LLM models and related files (Ollama, LM Studio, GGUF, Safetensors)
Inspects Docker images, containers, volumes, and compose projects
Identifies DevOps tools (CLI tools for AWS/GCP/Azure, kubectl, Terraform, Ansible)
Lists installed security tools (nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, Wireshark)
Analyzes disk usage (top folders by size, large files, caches)
Modular design allowing for individual module scans
Saves audit results to a text file on the Desktop
primary_use_case: To provide users with a detailed inventory and analysis of all software and related components installed on their macOS system, aiding in system management, cleanup, and understanding.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous digital librarian standing in a vast, organized library filled with shelves representing different software categories on a macOS system. The librarian is using a glowing magnifying glass to examine a book labeled 'Installed Software,' revealing intricate details about each application, language, and tool within. Small holographic projections of code snippets, Docker containers, and AI models float around the librarian, illustrating the diverse nature of the audit. The background subtly shows a stylized macOS desktop. The scene is brightly lit with a clean, modern aesthetic, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with clear iconography and a focus on detail.

name: qnote
description: Minimal Tauri desktop note editor with Markdown, PDF export, and file history
readme_summary: qnote is a minimal, cross-platform desktop note editor built with Tauri and React. It focuses on providing a clean interface for writing and managing notes, with features like Markdown support, live preview, file history, and PDF/HTML export.
primary_use_case: A lightweight, feature-rich desktop application for writing, organizing, and exporting notes in plain text and Markdown formats.
cover_image_prompt: A minimalist, cozy study room where a single, glowing quill pen is actively writing on a scroll. As the quill writes, the text on the scroll magically transforms into a neatly organized stack of documents and a small, elegant PDF file. The room has subtle digital elements, like floating data particles and a small, unobtrusive screen showing the 'qnote' logo and a simple file history timeline. The overall mood is calm and productive, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, ambient lighting and a balanced color palette.
